basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli (NIT Tiruchirappalli) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Project Assistant. Candidates with M.E/M.Tech Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 13-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through NIT Tiruchirappalli official website.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
